category_sources: Official README describes VT Code as an open-source coding agent with LLM-native code understanding and shell safety.
source_facts.description says vtcode is a CLI Semantic Coding Agent.
display_name_sources: Official README uses VT Code as the product name.
source_facts.name and executable identify the vtcode CLI.
docs_sources: Official GitHub repository contains a docs directory and README links installation, provider, ACP, and feature guides.
repo_sources: Official GitHub page identifies vinhnx/VTCode as the public repository.
source_facts.homepage is the official GitHub repository URL.
tags_sources: Official README describes LLM-native code understanding, shell safety, multiple providers, and terminal usage.
source_facts.description identifies a CLI semantic coding agent.
